message:
fix(ci): use branch ref for dtolnay/rust-toolchain action

The dtolnay/rust-toolchain action uses the git ref to determine which
Rust toolchain to install. Using a pinned commit hash doesn't work
because the action can't infer the desired toolchain version from it.

Changed from pinned commit hash to @nightly branch ref across all jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
 
@@ -88,7 +88,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@9d47c6ad4b02e050fd481d890b2ea34778fd09d6 # v2.7.8
@@ -144,7 +144,7 @@ jobs:

-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly

-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly
